name: 10q26_EBF3_SD
description: 10q26.3 distal subtelomeric segmental duplication block flanking EBF3, DUX4L-like and CYP2E1. Shares duplicons with other subtelomeres (4q35, 4p16, 8p23) and predisposes to recurrent 10q26 microdeletion syndrome.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules of 5-50 kb at 92-97% identity shared with multiple subtelomeres; DUX4-like macrosatellite remnants in distal end.
